high_level_description: A cinematic Attack on Titan desktop wallpaper of Eren Yeager in Survey Corps gear standing on a Shiganshina rooftop, overlaid with cyan technical blueprint linework and bold industrial title typography.

style_description.lighting: stormy dusk light from the left, burnt-orange ember glow rising from below, cool teal ambient fill
style_description.art_style: hyper-realistic digital painting in the style of an Attack on Titan key visual, painterly texture combined with crisp translucent technical overlay graphics

compositional_deconstruction.background: A stormy dusk sky of layered slate-gray cloud banks broken by a band of burnt-orange light at the horizon, above the ruined tiled rooftops of Shiganshina district receding into smoke haze, with the stone face of Wall Maria looming faint in the far distance and drifting embers and steam filling the air.

elements.desc: Eren Yeager, a lean young man with shoulder-length dark brown hair and intense teal-green eyes, wearing the tan Survey Corps jacket with the Wings of Freedom crest, a dark green hooded cloak draped off one shoulder, white trousers, brown knee-high boots and full ODM gear harness, standing on a rooftop ridge gripping a steel blade and glaring toward the horizon.

The Colossal Titan emerging above the distant wall on the left, a skinless sixty-meter giant of exposed red muscle fiber and bared teeth wreathed in rising white steam, only its head and shoulders visible through the haze.

Thin cyan blueprint overlay graphics etched translucently across the left half of the scene, including an exploded schematic diagram of an ODM gear gas canister and grappling winch, fine crosshair reticles, measurement rulers and dashed trajectory arcs, drawn as glowing technical linework.
Large condensed industrial sans-serif headline in off-white with lightly distressed edges, stacked on two lines and aligned left near the top-left corner.

elements.text:
EREN YEAGER
SCOUT REGIMENT // 104TH CADET CORPS
elements.desc: Small cyan uppercase monospaced technical label on two lines set beneath the headline like a data readout tag, with a thin underline rule.
